name: Sorcerimon

signature_move.name: Crystal Cloud
signature_move.description: Summons snow clouds with its staff, causing massive blizzard.

description: Wizarmon 's comrade who came from " Witchelny ", the Digital World of another dimension. It is adept in light and ice sorcery ( high-level programming language s ), and when it offers prayer, it can heal wounds with its holy power. Its Special Move is summoning a snow cloud from its snow crystal-affixed staff, generating an immense blizzard ( Crystal Cloud ).
